name: CRDB Bank Plc
description: African bank and leading Financial Services Provider in Tanzania with presence in Tanzania and Burundi. Offers retail banking, premier banking, corporate, global markets & trading, microfinance, insurance, and custodial services.

* ###### For You

Accounts
###### [Current Account Every day operating account ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/current-account) ###### [Malkia Account Account designed for women ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/women-account) ###### [Savings Account Save for your future needs ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/savings-account) ###### [Junior Jumbo Account Account for your child ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/children-account) ###### [Scholar Account Account for University Students ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/student-account) ###### [Salary Account Facilitates salary payments ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/salary-account) ###### [Teen Account Account designed for teens ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/teenager-account) ###### [Niamoja An account designed for formal and informal community groups. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/group-account) ###### [Pension Account A Savings account designed for retirees ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/pension-account) ###### [CRDB Simba Account Account for Simba Fans ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/simba-account) ###### [CRDB Yanga Account Account for Yanga Fans ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/yanga-account) ###### [Fahari Kilimo Saving Account An account designed for individual farmers ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/agriculture-saving-account) ###### [Fahari Kilimo Current Account An account designed for cooperatives, farmer's association and farmer's groups ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/personal-banking/agriculture-current-account)
* [Borrow](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan)
Borrow
###### [Personal Loan Loan facility to enable your personal growth ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/personal-loan) ###### [Jijenge Mortgage Loan Loan from TZS 20 Million - 1 Billion at an affordable interest ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/mortgage-loan) ###### [Boom Advance Loan Short-term financial solutions to students prior to receiving HESLB allowances. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/student-loan) ###### [Salary Advance An inexpensive way to access an instant loan ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/salary-advance) ###### [Jinasue A flexible credit facility that automatically tops up shortfalls in a customer's account, allowing them to complete transactions even when their available balance is insufficient. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/jinasue) ###### [Pension Advance Pension Advance is a short-term ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/pension-advance) ###### [UNI Loan Uni Loan is a special short-term facility designed to help university students ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-you/bank-loan/uni-loan)

###### [SME Loan Enables Small and Medium Enterprises meet their Investment Capital needs. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/sme-loan) ###### [Malkia Proposition Enhances women access to finance and non-financial services ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/women-loans) ###### [MSE Loans Small ticket facilities issued to formal and informal micro and small enterprises. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/mse-loans) ###### [Komboa Loan Clear your stuck cargo and keep your business moving with CRDB Bank Komboa Loan. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/pre-shipment-finance) ###### [MSE Asset Financing Is a financing solution extended to MSE customers to finance acquisition of business vehicles. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/mse-asset-financing) ###### [Overdraft Facilities The Overdraft Facility gives entrepreneurs financial flexibility to allow businesses to meet working capital needs. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/overdraft-facilities) ###### [Local Purchase Order Finance Short-term transaction-based loan used to improve customer’s business ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/local-purchase-order-finance) ###### [Invoice Discounting Finance IDF allows SME businesses to borrow funds against confirmed unpaid Certificates ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/certificate-discounting-finance) ###### [SME Asset Financing Is a financing solution extended to customers to finance investments in specific assets. ](https://crdbbank.co.tz/en/for-business/business-loans/sme-asset-financing) ###### [Investment Financing These are loans for acquisition of items that are used for investment
